original text:
#CarerConversations toolkit available help involved with Carers Week June 2018.
Carers Week national celebration unpaid carers' contribution communities.
Over 33,000 people care friend, relative neighbour illness, disability borough Croydon alone.
Organisations, individuals, businesses community groups download free resources, including posters, pledges, flyers Facebook Twitter graphics help start #CarerConversations Croydon.
also find useful tips guidance national Carers Week website.
more information about Carers Week Carers Support Centre #CarerConversations, email Communications Officer
